name: python3-markdown2
title: python3-markdown2
summary: Fast and complete implementation of Markdown in Python3
description:
Fast and complete implementation of Markdown in Python3
Markdown is a text-to-HTML filter; it translates an easy-to-read /
easy-to-write structured text format into HTML. Markdown’s text format is most
similar to that of plain text email, and supports features such as headers,
emphasis, code blocks, blockquotes, and links.
.
This is a fast and complete Python3 implementation of the Markdown spec.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use markdown2 because Fast and complete implementation of Markdown in Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use markdown2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `markdown2 [PATHS...]` as documented upstream for markdown2.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair markdown2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `markdown2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
